If Start ACC Suite.cmd or Start Portal Discover.cmd closes immediately:

1. Check bootstrap.log FIRST (always created):
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\bootstrap.log

2. Double-click again — the window should pause on error so you can read red text.

3. Check detailed run logs (if launcher-log.ps1 is present in your dist folder):
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\acc-suite-*.log
   %USERPROFILE%\ACC-Suite\logs\portal-discover-*.log

4. If bootstrap.log says "CMD started" but nothing after "launch.ps1 started",
   PowerShell may be blocked by group policy — contact IT.

5. If bootstrap.log is empty, the .cmd file may be from an old download.
   Re-download the latest dist from GitHub main and confirm launcher-log.ps1
   is in the same folder as launch.ps1.

6. Email bootstrap.log (and any acc-suite-*.log) to Prakriti.
